data_quality: v0.1 best-effort seed populated from cited public sources and Crutchfield published specs.

sources.name: Manufacturer product pages (Pioneer, Kenwood, Sony, Alpine, Rockford Fosgate, JL Audio, Focal, Hertz, Morel)
sources.scope: Primary electrical specs (power handling, sensitivity, impedance, screen size, preout count, mounting depth) sourced directly from OEM product pages and press-release datasheets.

sources.name: CarAudio.com public forums
sources.scope: Real-world install notes, crossover behaviour, amplifier dyno cross-checks, and compatibility caveats (e.g. head-unit preout voltage vs. amp sensitivity matching).

sources.name: r/CarAV public threads
sources.scope: Community-sourced install tips, wiring gauge debates, enclosure depth measurements, and comparative impressions used as secondary cross-check.

sources.name: Crutchfield public spec sheets
sources.scope: Mounting-depth measurements, vehicle-fitment data, and curated spec tables used as the primary cross-reference for physical compatibility attributes.

sources.name: SoundDomain public spec PDFs
sources.scope: Secondary spec cross-reference for sensitivity, RMS power, and impedance figures where OEM pages were ambiguous.

sources.name: Diamond Audio public catalogues
sources.scope: Supplementary wiring-kit and component-speaker catalogue data used for gauge and amperage cross-checks.

constraints.description: Amplifier power_per_channel_w_4ohm should be within 0.5×–2× of the target speakers' power_handling_rms_w. Under-powering causes clipping; over-powering risks cone excursion damage.

Wiring kit gauge must be rated for the amplifier's peak current draw. At 13.8V, a 1200W amplifier draws ~90A RMS; a 0AWG kit (rated 300A+) is correct. A 4AWG kit (rated ~100A) is the minimum for amplifiers up to ~600W RMS total.

Subwoofers specified as enclosure_required: true must be paired with a sealed or ported box matching the manufacturer's recommended internal volume. Free-air install voids warranty and degrades performance.

The head unit's num_preouts must be greater than or equal to the number of amplifier input channels. A 5-channel amplifier requires a head unit with at minimum 3 preout pairs (front + rear + sub) or an active signal processor.

Component speaker mounting_depth_mm must not exceed the available door-panel depth at the install location. Typical OEM door cavities range from 55 mm–90 mm; aftermarket shallow-mount options target ≤65 mm.

Dual-voice-coil subwoofers wired in parallel present half the single-coil impedance. A D4 sub wired in parallel presents 2Ω to the amplifier — verify the amp's rated sub_channel_power_w_2ohm rather than the 4Ω figure.
